description_long: This fishing rod features a slender, elongated shaft with a gentle curve, constructed primarily from a dark, lightweight composite material. The handle is a full grip style, finished in a light brown, likely cork or EVA foam, providing ergonomic comfort for extended use. A metallic reel is securely attached near the base, with a visible reel seat and mounting hardware. The rod is equipped with several evenly spaced line guides, each appearing metallic and affixed along the length of the shaft, culminating in a flexible tip with a lure attached. The overall design is streamlined and functional, suitable for recreational or sport fishing in urban parks or waterfronts. No visible brand markings or logos are present on the rod.
description: A slender, curved fishing rod with a light brown ergonomic handle, metallic reel, and multiple line guides along a dark shaft. The tip is flexible and fitted with a lure.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rod, the curved shaft, handle, reel, and all line guides with the lure at the tip.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the rod's thin profile, curvature, and the reel's position relative to the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the entire rod, handle, reel, and line guides, with the lure visible at the tip.
description_view_3: View from the tip towards the handle, emphasizing the rod's curvature, the alignment of line guides, and the handle's ergonomic shape.
attribute_reel_attachment: A metallic reel is attached via a visible reel seat near the handle, with a secure mounting mechanism and metallic finish.
attribute_line_guides: There are four visible metallic line guides, evenly spaced along the rod, with a single-footed design and a silver color.
attribute_handle_type: Full grip handle, made of light brown cork or EVA foam, cylindrical and ergonomically shaped for comfort.
attribute_brand_logo: No brand logo or marking is visible on the rod.
attribute_tip_flexibility: The rod tip appears to be light to medium in flexibility, suitable for general freshwater fishing.
